category_sources: source_facts.description says sylph provides ultrafast taxonomic profiling and genome querying for metagenomic samples.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name, source_facts.homepage, and source_facts.repo use the project name sylph.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official repository; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description provides the metagenomics, taxonomic profiling, and genome querying terms; source_facts.executables lists a CLI.
